title: Hermès Birkin 25 Noir Togo
collection_description: Iconic structured top-handle bag in various sizes, leathers, and hardware finishes.
description:
Hermès Birkin 25 in Noir Togo leather. 25 x 20 x 13 cm.

Iconic structured top-handle bag featuring a front flap with signature turn-lock closure, double rolled handles, and a clochette with padlock and keys. Interior lined in Chevre leather with one zipper pocket and one open pocket.

details_interior: Chevre leather lining with one zipper pocket and one open pocket

title: Hermès Evelyne 29 PM Gold Clemence
collection_description: Casual crossbody bag with a perforated H motif on the front panel.
description:
Hermès Evelyne 29 PM in Gold Clemence leather. 29 x 30 x 10 cm.

Casual crossbody bag with the iconic perforated H motif on the front panel. Features an adjustable canvas shoulder strap, rear open pocket, and a snap-button closure. Relaxed and effortless for daily wear.

details_interior: Rear open pocket with unlined canvas interior

title: Hermès Garden Party 36 Etoupe Toile H Canvas
collection_description: Lightweight unstructured tote in canvas and leather, ideal for everyday use.
description:
Hermès Garden Party 36 in Etoupe Toile H Canvas leather. 36 x 26 x 17 cm.

Lightweight unstructured tote combining Toile H canvas with leather trim. Features an open top, interior zipper pocket, and snap-button side gussets for adjustable width. A versatile everyday companion.

title: Hermès Lindy 26 Craie Clemence

Hermès Lindy 26 in Craie Clemence leather. 26 x 18 x 14 cm.

Dual-handle shoulder bag with a distinctive curved silhouette and top zip closure. Features two short handles for hand carry, a wide zip opening for easy access, and a relaxed, slouchy body. Interior with one zipper pocket.
